--- SOURCE 1: Real-time control of urban drainage systems using neuro-evolution ---
URL: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0301479724011198

SUMMARY:
This study presents a new RTC method using neuro-evolution for controlling combined sewer overflow (CSO) in urban drainage systems.

enriched_points.expanded_content: Real-time monitoring systems, utilizing IoT sensors, provide immediate feedback on water levels, enabling quick adjustments to drainage operations and reducing flood risks.
Predictive modeling leverages historical and real-time data, allowing urban planners to simulate various scenarios and optimize responses, improving overall system management.
Integrating advanced control algorithms enhances drainage system performance, reducing operational costs and ensuring efficient resource allocation during extreme weather events.
